case_title: HAYES VALLEY SURGERY CENTER, LLC. VS. CRISTA MYERS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAYES VALLEY SURGERY CENTER, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MYERS, CRISTA $4,999.00 PRINCIPAL, $127.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,126.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,999.99 FILED BY HAYES VALLEY SURGERY CENTER, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS, CRISTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYES VALLEY SURGERY CENTER, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-13-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY OMAR FLAMENCO--ADMINISTRATOR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 77.50- SERVED SEP-26-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS, CRISTA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYES VALLEY SURGERY CENTER, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY OMAR FLAMENCO---ADMINISTRATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
